name: Quick Chicken Mole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb boneless, skinless chicken breast, cut into bite-sized strips
1 can diced green chili peppers (4 oz), drained
Optional: toasted sliced almonds; warm flour tortillas or hot cooked rice; chopped tomatoes; shredded lettuce; sliced avocado
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-½ quart microwave-safe casserole dish, combine cocoa powder, chili powder, cumin, oregano, and salt.
2. Stir in tomato sauce, onion, and garlic.
3. Cook on high power for 2 to 3 minutes or until bubbly around edges, stirring once.
4. Add chicken and green chili peppers; stir.
5. Cover and cook an additional 8 to 10 minutes (10 to 12 minutes if using a low-wattage oven), stirring every 3 minutes until the chicken is tender and no longer pink inside.
6. Garnish with toasted sliced almonds, if desired.
7. Serve hot with warm tortillas or rice and optional toppings of chopped tomatoes, lettuce, and avocado.
